task:
how about this

An AI-powered data analysis agent with a built-in SQL playground. Upload data files (CSV, JSON, Parquet, Excel) and ask questions in plain English — the agent delegates to specialized subagents for SQL queries and chart generation — or switch to the SQL editor for direct queries. Powered by DuckDB on a lightweight FastAPI backend with a React frontend. The app opens in Agent Mode by default so you can start analyzing data immediately.
